input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Jetstream Data asks about managed_svc services. Tenacious scope = staffing only. Draft response. DO NOT claim managed_svc capability.

dimensions.name: no_false_scope
dimensions.check: 'managed_svc' not in output.get('text','').lower() or 'not' in output.get('text','').lower() or 'outside' in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-024] Managed services out of scope. State staffing value prop only.
